name_en: Stone stupas and Buddhist images of Bukkoji Temple
description_en: Stone stupas (itabi) and stone Buddhist images at Bukkoji Temple, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Shoji.

name_en: Stone Buddha group of Sekibutsuji Temple
description_en: A group of stone Buddhist images at Sekibutsuji Temple, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Takadama.

name_en: Six-sided pillar of Shoji
description_en: The six-sided stone pillar (rokumendo) of Shoji, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Shoji.

name_en: Dainichi stone stupa of Shoji
description_en: The Dainichi stone stupa (itabi) of Shoji, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Shoji.

name_en: Tahoto pagoda (treasure pagoda of the former Tozenji site)
description_en: A Tahoto treasure pagoda from the site of the former Tozenji Temple, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Nukuzu.

name_en: Mountain gate of Tokushoji Temple
description_en: The mountain gate (sanmon) of Tokushoji Temple, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Narasawa.

name_en: Stone stupa of Kamioginoto
description_en: The stone stupa (itabi) of Kamioginoto, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Kamioginoto.

name_en: Stone stupa group of Aratani
description_en: A group of stone stupas (itabi) at Aratani, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Aratani.

name_en: Tiered stone pagoda of Kitahara
description_en: The tiered stone pagoda (soto) of Kitahara, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Kawarago.

name_en: Mountain gate of Anrakuji Temple
description_en: The mountain gate (sanmon) of Anrakuji Temple, a tangible cultural property (building). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Takadama.

name_romaji: Shihon bokuga Kanzan Jittoku zu den Kaō Sōnen hitsu
name_en: Ink painting of Hanshan and Shide, attributed to Kao Sonen
description_en: An ink-on-paper painting of Hanshan and Shide (Kanzan and Jittoku) attributed to Kao Sonen, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City.

name_romaji: Ema toneri hikigoma no zu (shihon chakushoku shinme zu) Mogami Ienobu hitsu
name_en: Votive tablet of a groom leading a sacred horse, by Mogami Ienobu
description_en: A votive tablet (ema) depicting a groom leading a sacred horse, colored on paper, brushed by Mogami Ienobu, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Kitame.

name_romaji: Kenpon tansai Tōto Ueno muchū no hana zu / Tōto Ueno Shinobazu uchū no hana zu Utagawa Hiroshige hitsu
name_en: Light-color silk paintings of Ueno flowers in mist and rain, by Utagawa Hiroshige
description_en: Light-color silk paintings of flowers at Ueno in mist and at Shinobazu in rain, brushed by Utagawa Hiroshige, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Ichinichimachi.

name_romaji: Kenpon tansai Bukin-zawa Suzugaura zu / Bukin-zawa Tobiishiyama zu Utagawa Hiroshige hitsu
name_en: Light-color silk paintings of Bukinzawa Suzugaura and Tobiishiyama, by Utagawa Hiroshige
description_en: Light-color silk paintings of Suzugaura and Tobiishiyama at Bukinzawa, brushed by Utagawa Hiroshige, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City.

name_romaji: Ryūa no zu (shihon bokuga uu zu) Gōnome Sadashige hitsu
name_en: Painting of a willow and crow, by Gonome Sadashige
description_en: An ink-on-paper painting of a willow and crow in the rain, brushed by Gonome Sadashige, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Terazu.

name_romaji: Kenpon chakushoku Matsudaira Yasukuni zō Utagawa Hiroshige hitsu
name_en: Colored silk portrait of Matsudaira Yasukuni, by Utagawa Hiroshige
description_en: A colored silk portrait of Matsudaira Yasukuni brushed by Utagawa Hiroshige, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oinomori.

name_romaji: Kenpon chakushoku Tano Bunchū zō Utagawa Hiroshige hitsu
name_en: Colored silk portrait of Tano Bunchu, by Utagawa Hiroshige
description_en: A colored silk portrait of Tano Bunchu brushed by Utagawa Hiroshige, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oinomori.

name_romaji: Kenpon tansai Tōto Sumidagawa zu / Tōto Tobishima zu Utagawa Hiroshige hitsu
name_en: Light-color silk paintings of the Sumida River and Tobishima, by Utagawa Hiroshige
description_en: Light-color silk paintings of the Sumida River and Tobishima, brushed by Utagawa Hiroshige, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Ichinichimachi.

name_romaji: Kenpon tansai Yoshino no sakura zu / Tatsutagawa no momiji zu Utagawa Hiroshige hitsu
name_en: Light-color silk paintings of Yoshino cherry blossoms and Tatsuta River maples, by Utagawa Hiroshige
description_en: Light-color silk paintings of cherry blossoms at Yoshino and autumn maples on the Tatsuta River, brushed by Utagawa Hiroshige, a tangible cultural property (painting). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Kamata-honmachi.

name_en: Wooden seated statue attributed to the Bodhisattva Gyoki
description_en: A wooden seated statue said to depict the Bodhisattva Gyoki, a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Yamamoto.

name_en: Wooden seated statue of Monju in priestly form
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Monju Bosatsu in priestly form, a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Yamamoto.

name_en: Wooden standing statue of Fudo Myoo
description_en: A wooden standing statue of Fudo Myoo, a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Yamamoto.

name_en: Wooden guardian lion-dogs (pair)
description_en: A pair of wooden guardian lion-dogs (komainu), a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Yamamoto.

name_en: Bronze standing statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A bronze standing statue of Amida Nyorai, a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Yamamoto.

name_romaji: Kekō Bosatsu (mokuzō den Miroku Bosatsu) izō
name_en: Wooden seated statue of Keko Bosatsu, said to be Miroku
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Keko Bosatsu, said to depict Miroku Bosatsu, a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Takagi.

name_en: Wooden seated statue of the priest Tokuhon
description_en: A wooden seated statue of the priest Tokuhon, a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Shoji.

name_romaji: Den Shōgun Jizō Bosatsu zō (mokuzō Jizō Bosatsu zazō)
name_en: Wooden seated Jizo statue, said to be Shogun Jizo
description_en: A wooden seated statue of Jizo Bosatsu, said to depict Shogun Jizo, a tangible cultural property (sculpture). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Doman.

name_romaji: Kiri karakusa hōō monyō karaori haritsuke taketsutsu (monjo-ire tsutsu)
name_en: Bamboo document container covered with paulownia-arabesque phoenix brocade
description_en: A bamboo document container covered with brocade of paulownia arabesque and phoenix design, a tangible cultural property (craft). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Naru.

name_en: Sleeveless woven garment (amie)
description_en: A sleeveless woven garment (amie), a tangible cultural property (craft). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Shoji.

name_en: Gong inscribed with a date in Einin 3
description_en: A gong (shoko) bearing an inscription dated the third month of Einin 3 (1295), a tangible cultural property (craft). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Shoji.

name_en: Letters of Mogami Yoshiaki
description_en: Letters of Mogami Yoshiaki, a tangible cultural property (calligraphy). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Yamamoto.

name_en: Surviving calligraphy of Yoshida Daihachi
description_en: The surviving calligraphy (iboku) of Yoshida Daihachi, a tangible cultural property (calligraphy). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Tendo.

name_en: Long sword excavated at Daimyojinbara (No. 1)
description_en: A long sword excavated at Daimyojinbara (No. 1), a tangible cultural property (archaeological material). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Midaregawa.

name_en: Long sword excavated at Daimyojinbara (No. 2)
description_en: A long sword excavated at Daimyojinbara (No. 2), a tangible cultural property (archaeological material). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Doman.

name_en: Anomalous earthenware vessel
description_en: An anomalously shaped earthenware vessel (igyo doki), a tangible cultural property (archaeological material). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Doman.

name_en: Ink-inscribed pebble excavated at the Koyabo site
description_en: An ink-inscribed pebble (bokusho reki) excavated at the Koyabo site, a tangible cultural property (archaeological material). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Oshimizu.

name_en: Portrait/statue of Yoshida Daihachi
description_en: A portrait or statue of Yoshida Daihachi, a tangible cultural property (historical material). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Tendo.

name_en: Duck habitat marsh of Harasaki
description_en: The duck habitat marsh of Harasaki, a monument (natural monument). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Yamaguchi.

name_en: Zelkova grove of Yakushi Shrine
description_en: The zelkova grove of Yakushi Shrine, a monument (natural monument). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Naru.

name_en: Sacred grove of Takeisao Shrine
description_en: The sacred grove (shaso) of Takeisao Shrine, a monument (natural monument). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Tendo City, located at Oaza Tendo.
